description_long: This house features a modern architectural layout with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, flat roofs, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The exterior is characterized by a combination of white and gray surfaces, large glass windows, and several outdoor living areas, including a pool and landscaped garden. The structure includes both single and double-story sections, with prominent terraces and balconies. The property is surrounded by a low boundary and features paved walkways and driveways. The landscaping incorporates palm trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and terraces. The exterior features white and gray surfaces, open balconies, and contemporary landscaping.
description_view_0: From this view, the house's pool area and landscaped garden are most visible, along with the flat roof sections and open terraces.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main entryway, driveway, and a prominent two-story section with large windows and a covered porch.
description_view_2: Here, the rear of the house is visible, showing additional terraces, a secondary entrance, and more of the garden and pool area.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side elevation, with visible balconies, a mix of single and double-story volumes, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a covered porch, steps, and minimalist landscaping.
